mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_query_log (user_id, question, retrieved_count, top_score, is_rag_hit, is_rejected, doc_ids_hit, min_score_used, latency_ms, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{question}, #{retrievedCount}, #{topScore}, #{ragHit}, #{rejected}, #{docIdsHit}, #{minScoreUsed}, #{latencyMs}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_query_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_query_log WHERE is_rejected = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_query_log WHERE is_rag_hit = 1
